sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Latham & Watkins Advises Mission in US$430 Million Acquisition of Calavo Growers
feed.summary: Latham & Watkins LLP advised Mission Produce, Inc. in its US$430 million acquisition of Calavo Growers, Inc. The deal, structured as a cash-and-stock transaction, will result in Calavo stockholders receiving US$27 per share, composed of cash and Mission shares. This acquisition is subject to regulatory and shareholder approvals and is expected to close by the end of August 2026.

feed.title: RBC Capital initiates Astera Labs stock with Outperform rating, $225 target
feed.summary: RBC Capital has initiated coverage on Astera Labs (NASDAQ:ALAB) with an Outperform rating and a $225 price target. The firm cited strong near-term fundamentals from core retimer growth and Scorpio-P switch ramps, along with the expected 2026 ramp of Astera’s Scorpio-X scale-up switch, as key drivers for its positive outlook. Despite recent stock underperformance due to concerns about networking standards and Google's TPU advancements, RBC Capital justifies its premium valuation based on Astera Labs' projected 40% growth rate, a $10-15 billion serviceable available market, and gross margins over 70%.

feed.title: Valens Semiconductor - Equity Warrant (VLN.WS) Price Target Decreased by 16.69% to 0.13
feed.summary: The average one-year price target for Valens Semiconductor - Equity Warrant (VLN.WS) has been reduced by 16.69% to $0.13 per share from a previous estimate of $0.15. This new target represents an increase of 42.58% from the latest reported closing price of $0.09 per share. Institutional ownership data shows 10 funds or institutions holding positions in VLN.WS, with key holders including LMR Partners LLP and D. E. Shaw.

feed.title: Hormel taps Borrelli as executive VP of Retail
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corp. has appointed Domenic Borrelli as executive vice president of Retail, effective February 23, 2026. Borrelli will oversee the Retail business unit, which includes many of the company's well-known consumer brands and is a major growth driver. He brings over 25 years of experience in the food and beverage industry, with a strong background in brand building, commercial strategy, and enterprise leadership.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Has Lowered Expectations for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) Stock Price
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has lowered its price target for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) to $122 from $126 but maintained an "Outperform" rating, indicating a potential 23.34% upside. Other firms like Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, and Roth Capital have also adjusted their targets, leading to a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $111.56. The article also details recent insider trading, including a significant sale by the CEO and a purchase by a director, alongside institutional investor activity.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) Price Target Raised to $1,300.00
feed.summary: BNP Paribas Exane has raised its price target for BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) to $1,300, maintaining an "outperform" rating, indicating a potential 12.31% upside. This follows BlackRock's strong Q4 performance, which saw estimates beaten with $13.16 EPS and $7.01 billion revenue, a record $14 trillion in Assets Under Management (AUM), and a 10% dividend hike along with a new share buyback authorization. Despite some analyst divergence on profitability, the overall sentiment remains positive, with a consensus target price of $1,303.18.

feed.title: Too much road salt can taint your tap water, New Jersey group warns
feed.summary: New Jersey American Water and The Watershed Institute are urging residents, businesses, and municipalities to limit winter road salt use to safeguard drinking water and aquatic ecosystems. Excessive salt can lead to a temporary salty taste in tap water and harm aquatic life, with effects potentially worsening in drought conditions. They are promoting Winter Salt Week (Jan. 26–30, 2026) to educate the public on practical, sustainable salting practices like shoveling first, using precise amounts of salt, and exploring alternatives like liquid brine.

feed.title: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) Price Target Cut to $195.00 by Analysts at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has reduced its price target for American Tower (NYSE:AMT) from $220.00 to $195.00, maintaining a "sector perform" rating. This adjustment suggests a potential upside of 7.42% from the stock's previous close, despite other analysts also trimming price targets. The company recently exceeded quarterly EPS expectations and provided optimistic FY2025 guidance.

feed.title: Mizuho Cuts American International Group (NYSE:AIG) Price Target to $83.00
feed.summary: Mizuho has adjusted its price target for American International Group (NYSE:AIG) to $83.00, down from $84.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock. This new target implies a potential upside of 12.16% from the insurance provider's previous closing price. The consensus rating among analysts for AIG is "Hold" with an average target price of $88.68, reflecting varied individual broker targets.

feed.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Stock Price Down 3.6% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) stock dropped 3.6% during mid-day trading on Thursday, with heightened trading volume. The article reviews various news headlines impacting IBM, noting positive sentiments regarding demand for integrated systems and AI-ready software, neutral sentiments around its upcoming earnings call and analyst attention, and negative sentiment stemming from competitive pressures with companies like Microsoft in the AI space. Analyst ratings for IBM are mixed, with an average "Moderate Buy" and a target price of $303.38.

feed.title: The Walt Disney Studios Announces Lucasfilm Leadership Transition
feed.summary: Kathleen Kennedy is stepping down as Lucasfilm President after nearly 14 years to return to full-time producing, focusing on upcoming films like The Mandalorian and Grogu and Star Wars: Starfighter. Dave Filoni will now lead Lucasfilm as President and Chief Creative Officer, alongside Lynwen Brennan as Co-President. Both Filoni and Brennan, long-time executives at Lucasfilm, will report to Disney Entertainment Co-Chairman Alan Bergman, guiding the studio into its next chapter of storytelling.

feed.title: BMS taps Immunai's AI platform for immune insights
feed.summary: BMS has partnered with Immunai to leverage its AI-powered platform for deeper insights into the immune system. This collaboration aims to accelerate drug discovery and development by utilizing Immunai's advanced capabilities in analyzing complex immunological data. The partnership highlights the increasing role of artificial intelligence in pharmaceutical research.

feed.title: Brazil shuts down Sigma Lithium waste piles over safety concerns
feed.summary: Brazil's Labor Ministry has ordered the shutdown of three waste piles at Sigma Lithium's flagship mine in Minas Gerais due to "grave and imminent" safety risks to workers and the local community. This action complicates Sigma's efforts to restart its lithium mine, which has been inactive since October. Despite Sigma's claims that the piles contain only soil and pose no threat, the ministry cited concerns about potential collapses affecting houses or the Piaui River, leading to a 15% drop in the company's shares after a Bank of America downgrade.

feed.title: Here's What Analysts Think About Fortinet (FTNT)
feed.summary: RBC Capital reiterated a Hold rating for Fortinet (FTNT) with an $85 price target, while Piper Sandler raised its price target to $90 from $85 but maintained a Neutral rating. These updates came as Fortinet announced it would release its fiscal Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on February 5. Despite cautious optimism for the cybersecurity sector in 2026, the article suggests that other AI stocks might offer greater upside potential and less downside risk.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Jabil (NYSE:JBL) Director Sells 500 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Jabil (NYSE:JBL) Director Anousheh Ansari sold 500 shares of the company's stock on January 13th for $120,000, reducing her position by 1.43%. This sale follows other recent transactions by Ansari, including selling 500 shares on January 15th and 1,500 shares on December 19th. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Buy" with a consensus target price of $263.71.

feed.title: Shimmick (SHIM) Price Target Increased by 50.00% to 4.59
feed.summary: Shimmick's (SHIM) average one-year price target has been raised by 50.00% to $4.59 per share, up from $3.06, according to analyst estimates. This new target represents a 23.06% increase from the last closing price of $3.73. Institutional ownership data shows 24 funds holding positions in Shimmick, with some firms like Pacific Ridge Capital Partners increasing their portfolio allocation despite a decrease in total institutional shares owned.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) Director Sells 3,125 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) Director Ray Stata sold 3,125 shares of the company's stock on January 13th at an average price of $297.27, totaling approximately $928,969. This transaction reduced his stake by 2.35% to 130,071 shares. Despite insider selling, ADI’s stock recently traded above $302, boasting a market cap of $147.9 billion and a P/E ratio of 66.25, with KeyCorp upgrading its rating to "Overweight" with a $375 price target.

feed.title: 374Water Inc Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Listing Requirement
feed.summary: 374Water Inc. announced on January 14, 2026, that it has regained compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule. The company met the $1.00 bid price requirement by maintaining it for ten consecutive business days. This development ensures its stock will continue trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market, following an initial non-compliance notice received in January 2025.

feed.title: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) Given New $225.00 Price Target at Rothschild & Co Redburn
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn has increased its price target for Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) from $150.00 to $225.00, maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 3.46%. Other analysts have also raised their price targets for the semiconductor company, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $189.55. The stock saw an increase of $8.68 on Tuesday to $217.47, with significant institutional investment and recent insider selling also noted.

feed.title: JB Hunt: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: JB Hunt Transport Services Inc. (JBHT) reported fourth-quarter profit of $181.1 million, or $1.90 per share, surpassing Wall Street expectations of $1.81 per share. However, the company's revenue of $3.1 billion for the quarter fell short of analysts' average estimate of $3.13 billion. For the full year, JB Hunt reported a profit of $598.3 million, or $6.12 per share, on revenue of $12 billion.

feed.title: Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) Price Target Cut to $249.00 by Analysts at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada analysts have reduced their price target for Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) to $249.00 from $253.00, while maintaining an "outperform" rating. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $233.70 for HON. The company's stock traded up by $1.98 to reach $215.02 during Thursday's trading.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Test Fires FIM-92 Stinger’s Possible Successor
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin has successfully completed the first flight test of its Next-Generation Short-Range Interceptor (NGSRI), a potential successor to the FIM-92 Stinger missile. This development is part of a competitive program by the U.S. Army to modernize its short-range air defense capabilities, with Raytheon also developing a competing design. The NGSRI, featuring a "Quadstar" design, incorporates advanced seeker technology, AI, and machine learning, and aims to be effective against a wide range of aerial threats, including drones, rotary- and fixed-wing aircraft.

feed.title: Targa Resources Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1 a Share, Payable Feb. 13 to Shareholders of Record Jan. 30
feed.summary: Targa Resources Corp. (TRGP) announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1 per share. The dividend is payable on February 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 30, 2026. This news comes alongside updates on analyst ratings and a recent acquisition by Targa Resources.

feed.title: QXO plans $750M common stock sale to fund acquisitions and other needs
feed.summary: QXO, Inc. announced its intention to offer $750 million in common stock to fund general corporate purposes, including future acquisitions. BofA Securities will act as the sole underwriter, with an option to purchase an additional $112.5 million in shares. The offering will be made via a prospectus supplement under QXO’s effective registration statement on Form S-3ASR.

feed.title: Parker to Announce Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Earnings on
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH) will release its fiscal 2026 second-quarter earnings before the market opens on Thursday, January 29, 2026. The company will host a conference call and webcast at 11:00 a.m. Eastern time to discuss the results and answer questions from investors and analysts. Parker Hannifin is recognized for its century-long history in motion and control technologies and its consistent dividend increases, ranking among the top S&P 500 companies.

feed.title: Labcorp Schedules Q4 2025 Earnings Release and Call
feed.summary: Labcorp (LH) announced it will release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results before the market opens on February 17, 2026. The company will also host a conference call and webcast for investors and analysts that day at 9 a.m. ET. Labcorp emphasizes transparency by making earnings releases, detailed financial information, and a webcast replay available on its investor relations website for nearly a year.

feed.title: Palmer Square Capital BDC Announces Year-End 2025 NAV
feed.summary: Palmer Square Capital BDC (PSBD) announced an estimated unaudited net asset value (NAV) per share of $14.83 as of December 31, 2025. This BDC focuses on providing financing solutions to corporate borrowers. An analyst has a Buy rating on PSBD with a $13.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates the stock as Neutral due to mixed financial performance.

feed.title: CALAVO GROWERS INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Calavo Growers, Inc. (CVGW) released its Form 10-K report for fiscal year 2025, detailing financial performance, operational highlights, and strategic initiatives. Despite a 2% decrease in net sales to $648.4 million, the company reported a significant increase in net income from continuing operations to $20.0 million, driven by improved operational efficiency and cost management, particularly in the Prepared segment. The report also highlights challenges such as an FDA detention hold on avocado imports and regulatory changes impacting tomato sales, alongside strategic moves like the sale of its Fresh Cut Business and a proposed merger with Mission Produce, Inc.

feed.title: Hormel Foods Taps Domenic Borrelli as Executive Vice President of Retail, Bringing Extensive Category Leadership to Iconic Brand Portfolio
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation has appointed Domenic Borrelli as Executive Vice President of Retail, effective February 23, 2026. Borrelli, with over 25 years of experience in the food and beverage industry, will oversee the company's Retail business unit. His background includes leadership roles at Danone North America and Kraft Foods, focusing on consumer-driven growth and brand building.

feed.title: Con Edison to Report 2025 Earnings on February 19
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) announced its intention to release its 2025 earnings report on February 19, 2026, after the market closes. The company, through its various subsidiaries, provides a wide range of energy-related services across New York and parts of New Jersey, including electric, gas, and steam, as well as developing electric transmission projects.

feed.title: Feb. 19 call to unpack Coeur Mining's 2025 results for investors in-depth
feed.summary: Coeur Mining, Inc. (NYSE: CDE) announced it will report its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 operational and financial results after the New York Stock Exchange closes on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. The company will host a conference call on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time, featuring its Chairman, President, and CEO, Mitchell J. Krebs, along with other key members of management. A replay of the call will be available until February 26, 2026.

feed.title: MKS Instruments Garners Optimistic Price Forecast Amid AI Boom
feed.summary: MKS Instruments (NASDAQ: MKSI) has received optimistic price forecasts from several financial analysts, including Mizuho, BofA, Cantor Fitzgerald, and CFRA, driven by potential growth in the AI infrastructure and semiconductor sectors. The company's stock has seen a nearly 10% increase, reflecting strong financial performance, effective capital management, and robust cash flow. Analysts anticipate sustained upward momentum for MKS Instruments as AI technologies continue to reshape the market and drive demand for its cutting-edge solutions.

feed.title: Leggett & Platt stock reaches 52-week high at $12.03 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Leggett & Platt stock hit a 52-week high of $12.03, reflecting a 22.2% one-year change and strong investor confidence. This comes despite recent news of the company missing Q3 2025 earnings and revenue forecasts, an all-stock acquisition proposal from Somnigroup International, and the board approving retention agreements for executives. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.05 per share.

feed.title: Devon Energy Corp. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corp. (DVN) shares fell 4.22% on Thursday, closing at $36.32, despite a generally positive trading session for the broader stock market. The S&P 500 Index and the Dow Jones Industrial Average both saw gains. This decline broke a two-day winning streak for Devon Energy Corp.

feed.title: SEI Investments Extends CEO Ryan Hicke’s Employment Agreement
feed.summary: SEI Investments (SEIC) has extended CEO Ryan Hicke's employment agreement through June 1, 2031, replacing his previous contract. The new agreement includes an annual base salary of $900,000, a target cash bonus of $2.7 million, and eligibility for annual equity grants. It also provides substantial severance protections and non-compete clauses, reinforcing leadership continuity and stability.

feed.title: Lockheed delivered record 191 F-35s as it cleared out TR-3 backlog
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin delivered a record 191 F-35 Joint Strike Fighters in 2025, clearing a backlog caused by issues with the Technology Refresh 3 (TR-3) upgrade. This delivery figure significantly exceeds previous years, which were impacted by a government-imposed halt on F-35 acceptance due to TR-3 problems. The article also highlights the F-35's combat roles and the first engagement by NATO F-35s against threats in allied air space.

feed.title: SunCoke Energy names Shantanu Agrawal as new CFO effective March 2026
feed.summary: SunCoke Energy (NYSE:SXC) has announced that Shantanu Agrawal, current Vice President of Finance and Treasurer, will become the new CFO effective March 13, 2026, following Mark W. Marinko's retirement. The company emphasized Agrawal's extensive experience and deep knowledge of SunCoke's business. SunCoke Energy, trading at $8.25, has shown a strong year-to-date return of 14% and a significant dividend yield of 5.85%, and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro.

feed.title: Texas Instruments declares quarterly dividend of $1.42 per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.42 per share, yielding 2.94% based on its current share price. The company has a strong dividend history, maintaining payments for 55 consecutive years and increasing them for 22 years. This announcement follows recent financial guidance and product developments, including new automotive semiconductors.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Fourth-Quarter Revenue Falls on Lower Intermodal Sales
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services reported a decline in fourth-quarter revenue, primarily due to lower transcontinental load volumes. Despite the revenue fall, the company's profit increased to $181.1 million, or $1.90 a share, surpassing analyst expectations. The logistics company's quarterly revenue decreased by 2% to $3.10 billion.

feed.title: PDD Sees Unusually Large Options Volume (NASDAQ:PDD)
feed.summary: PDD Holdings Inc. experienced unusually large options trading volume on Thursday, with 137,643 put options purchased, an 83% increase over the daily average. This comes as institutional investors, including Allspring Global Investments, significantly adjusted their stakes in the company. PDD currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $139.25.

feed.title: Dollar Tree’s Viral Valentine’s Day Trees Are Back—But Probably Not for Long
feed.summary: Dollar Tree has brought back its popular 18-inch Valentine's Day trees in red and pink for just $1.50, which quickly went viral last year on TikTok. Shoppers are eager to get their hands on these decorations, as they are not available for shipping and are expected to sell out fast in stores. Given their high demand, several alternative mini trees are suggested from Amazon for those who miss out.

feed.title: United Rentals to Hold Q4 2025 Earnings Call on January 29, 2026
feed.summary: United Rentals will host its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings call on January 29, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET, following the release of its detailed financial results after market close on January 28, 2026. The call will feature CEO Matt Flannery and CFO Ted Grace, providing insights into the company's performance. United Rentals, the world's largest equipment rental company, has received varied analyst ratings, with an average 1-year price target of $1032.

feed.title: Raymond James snaps up $46B Clark Capital in major wealth management expansion
feed.summary: Raymond James is expanding its asset management capabilities through the acquisition of Clark Capital Management Group, a Philadelphia-based firm managing over $46 billion in assets. Clark Capital, known for its advisor-centric wealth solutions and model portfolios, will operate as an independent boutique within Raymond James Investment Management. This strategic deal aims to broaden Raymond James's offerings and strengthen its position in key advisor-focused channels.

feed.title: Halliburton (HAL) Appoints New President for Western Hemisphere
feed.summary: Halliburton Company (HAL) has appointed Michael Casey Maxwell as President of its Western Hemisphere operations, effective February 1, 2026. Maxwell, with nearly two decades at Halliburton, previously served as Senior Vice President, North America Land. His compensation package will include an annual base salary of $800,000, along with participation in various incentive plans.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport reports mixed Q4 results as cost management mitigates 'soft demand' (JBHT:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) reported mixed financial results for the fourth quarter, with effective cost management helping the logistics company achieve better-than-expected profits despite a 2% decline in revenue. The company's ability to control expenses related to insurance, claims, salaries, and non-owned equipment was key in mitigating the impact of soft demand.

feed.title: Vistra Corp. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Vistra Corp.'s stock (VST) rose on a strong trading day, outperforming its competitors and the broader market. Despite closing below its 52-week high, the company's shares gained 2.19%, while the S&P 500 declined. This positive movement suggests a favorable trading sentiment for Vistra among investors.

feed.title: Amgen Teases Phase 2 Results for MariTide, Its Weight-Loss Drug
feed.summary: Amgen has released promising Phase 2 study results for its obesity drug, MariTide. The biotech firm indicated that the drug shows potential for less frequent dosing, which could be a significant advantage in the weight-loss market. Details of the study were disclosed, suggesting a positive outlook for the drug's development.

feed.title: PainReform Rebrands as PRF Technologies to Reflect Expansion into Healthcare and AI-Driven Energy
feed.summary: PainReform has officially rebranded as PRF Technologies Ltd. to signify its expansion beyond a single drug into diverse healthcare and AI-driven energy sectors, following shareholder approval on January 6, 2026. The company's broadened portfolio now includes LayerBio's ocular therapy and the DeepSolar AI-based solar analytics business, aiming to pursue multiple growth paths in specialty pharmaceuticals and renewable energy. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates PRFX as Neutral due to weak financial performance and technical downtrends, despite some oversold indicators.

feed.title: Sysco (NYSE:SYY) Reports Q3 CY2025 In Line With Expectations
feed.summary: Sysco (NYSE:SYY) has reported its Q3 CY2025 results, meeting Wall Street's revenue expectations with a 3.2% year-on-year sales increase to $21.15 billion. The company's adjusted EPS of $1.15 surpassed analyst estimates by 2.6%, although adjusted EBITDA missed expectations. Sysco's revenue growth has slowed in recent years, with operating margins remaining stable but considered inadequate for the consumer discretionary sector.

feed.title: Is Deere's (DE) Layoff Wave Reframing Its Precision-Tech Margin Story?
feed.summary: Deere has initiated significant layoffs across its U.S. factories due to weakened agricultural demand from lower crop prices and high production costs for farmers. Despite these near-term challenges, the company is a key player in growing precision technology sectors like precision forestry and advanced automation. This article explores how these workforce reductions and broader agricultural headwinds will impact Deere's investment narrative, which relies on technology-led margin improvements to offset cyclical pressures.
